# Security Policy

## Reporting a security vulnerability

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, **DO NOT CREATE AN ISSUE**. Instead, please use [GitHub's Private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability) for this repository.

We treat all reports with the highest priority and confidentiality.

## Incident resolution process

After a report has been submitted, a security vulnerability will be privately discussed, fixed, and then publicly disclosed in a security advisory, involving the following steps:

* Confirm the problem and determine the affected versions
* Audit code to find any potential similar problems
* Prepare fixes for all releases still under maintenance
* Release fixes as fast as possible
* Publicly disclose the security problem in a security advisory
